{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Red madra
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Red madra]] can appear as a dense rope of congealed power.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] produced a rope of red [[madra]] from her core to grab [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
